model_contract.forbidden_double_count: Optical graph-link energy is not imported. SerDes, E/O, O/E, laser, and tuning are charged exactly once by this sidecar.

O1.derivation: DirectedMeshEdges has 12 east plus 12 south edges; AddOpticalEdge instantiates one E/O lane per edge

O2.derivation: 24 directed mesh edges x 2 wavelengths instantiated by AddOpticalEdge

O4.derivation: 24 directed mesh edges x 4 wavelengths instantiated by AddOpticalEdge

H4.derivation: DirectedExpressEdges has 8 two-column plus 8 two-row edges; each instantiates 4 wavelengths

low.description: Optimistic published envelope; passive/athermal optical routing and best reported circuit points.

nominal.description: Central literature-backed profile without process scaling; intentionally combines measured blocks from disclosed nodes.

high.description: Conservative published envelope; older/high-power receiver, measured high serializer point, low WPE and active resonant tuning ceiling.

sources.unit: directed optical edge and provisioned E/O lane
sources.wavelength_count: O1=1, O2=2, O4=4, H4=4 per optical edge
sources.reported_value: O1/O2/O4 use 24 directed mesh optical edges; H4 uses 16 directed express optical edges
sources.conversion: provisioned_tx_lanes = optical_directed_edges x wavelengths_per_edge; static laser/tuning cover the full instantiated architecture

sources.line_rate: 128 bits/cycle input and 128 bits/cycle lane rate
sources.reported_value: gearbox_latency_cycles=0 and no independent rate-conversion component is instantiated
sources.conversion: gearbox energy is explicitly excluded as 0 pJ/bit; this is a topology exclusion, not a literature energy point

sources.reported_value: low=1 dB, nominal=3 dB, high=6 dB
sources.conversion: added to cited average-power receiver sensitivity before path loss; explicit uncertainty guardband, not a measured source value

sources.reported_value: Eight data octets map to a 66-bit block with a 2-bit sync header.
sources.conversion: encoded_bits = ceil(payload_bits/64)*66; trace reports 128->132 directly

sources.source: Oh, Park, Hwang, IEEE Transactions on VLSI Systems 33(1)
sources.reported_value: TX latchless serializer 0.43; RX hybrid CDR/edge deserializer 0.53; complete transceiver including PLL/clock 1.23
sources.conversion: Use 0.43 on original serializer bits and 0.53 on encoded deserializer bits in low profile; no process scaling

sources.reported_value: 20:1 serializer 1.60 pJ/bit
sources.conversion: Direct nominal serializer energy; no process or rate scaling

sources.source: Li et al., Journal of Instrumentation 21 C02013
sources.reported_value: 96.2 mW at 10.24 Gb/s = 9.40 pJ/bit; includes PLL and driver pre-amplifier
sources.conversion: 96.2 mW / 10.24 Gb/s; conservative high serializer envelope

sources.reported_value: Four CTLEs, four CDRs, and shared MDLL consume 241.8 mW
sources.conversion: 241.8 mW / 100 Gb/s = 2.418 pJ/bit nominal RX/CDR; deserializer ownership included

sources.source: Liu et al., IEICE Electronics Express 22(2)
sources.reported_value: Simulated receiver energy efficiency 5.99 pJ/bit including CTLE/DFE/CDR path
sources.conversion: Use as high envelope only; explicitly retain simulated evidence label

sources.node_process: 28 nm CMOS + AIM Photonics silicon photonics
sources.wavelength_count: single-lane measurements; comb estimate per line
sources.reported_value: Transmitter about 50 fJ/bit, receiver 70 fJ/bit, DFB laser estimate 47 fJ/bit, comb estimate 30 fJ/bit; receiver average input -24.85 dBm; modulator insertion loss 2.5 dB
sources.conversion: 0.05/0.07 pJ/bit low E/O and O/E; 30 fJ/bit at 10 Gb/s -> 0.3 mW electrical per-line floor

sources.reported_value: Driver energy 0.70-1.54 pJ/bit; measured MZM insertion loss 3.7 dB (1.27 mm) and 6.9 dB (2.47 mm)
sources.conversion: Use endpoints for nominal/high E/O dynamic energy and insertion loss; no rate scaling

sources.source: Ozkaya et al., IEEE Journal of Solid-State Circuits
sources.reported_value: Receiver data path energy efficiency 1.4 pJ/bit
sources.conversion: Direct nominal O/E receiver/TIA energy; sensitivity sourced separately

sources.reported_value: De-embedded average sensitivity -13.2 dBm at BER 1e-12
sources.conversion: Use nominal receiver target before explicit 3 dB modeling margin

sources.node_process: 90 nm SOI CMOS + Ge waveguide detector
sources.unit: pJ/bit and dBm average received power
sources.reported_value: 3.4 pJ/bit and -7.3 dBm sensitivity at BER 1e-12
sources.conversion: Direct high O/E energy and receiver sensitivity; no scaling

sources.reported_value: About 0.15 dB filter loss and about 1 dB channel insertion including access routing
sources.conversion: Passive dynamic energy = 0; use 0.15 dB low and 1.0 dB nominal per mux or demux

sources.reported_value: Measured insertion loss approximately 2 dB
sources.conversion: Passive dynamic energy = 0; use 2 dB high per mux or demux

sources.source: AIM Photonics APSUNY Low-Loss Component Library official PDK page
sources.line_rate: waveguide passive; modulators/detectors listed to 100 Gb/s
sources.reported_value: Silicon rib 0.25 dB/cm, SiN 0.325 dB/cm, silicon 0.8 dB/cm; thermal phase shifter Ppi <26 mW
sources.conversion: Divide dB/cm by 10 for dB/mm; 26 mW is used only as conservative high tuning ceiling

sources.reported_value: 61.54 mW output and 28.49% power conversion efficiency
sources.conversion: Use 0.2849 as low-profile wall-plug efficiency and 61.54 mW as per-lane feasibility ceiling

sources.source: Moscoso-Martir et al., Scientific Reports 7, calibrated WDM link
sources.reported_value: Non-amplified link used about 14 mW DFB optical output; MLL and SOA operating points were 360 mW and 780 mW electrical
sources.conversion: 14 mW optical divided by 10% WPE gives 140 mW conservative high per-lane electrical operating point

sources.source: Norman et al., Nature Communications 15, laser integration roadmap
sources.reported_value: 10% wall-plug efficiency used as roadmap system assumption
sources.conversion: Use 0.10 in high profile

sources.reported_value: 3.9 mW tuning power per FSR
sources.conversion: Use 3.9 mW per active resonator in nominal profile

sources.reported_value: No active thermal resonator instantiated in low profile
sources.conversion: Explicit exclusion, not an unreported zero; low profile tuning energy is exactly zero
